description_long: This is a vertically standing bag of Cook's Smoky Bacon snacks, featuring a predominantly black background with a bold red diagonal stripe across the front. The front displays a high-resolution image of crispy bacon strips, accompanied by white and red text indicating the flavor and product details. The back of the bag is densely covered with white text, including a product description, nutritional facts, and other regulatory information. The sides of the bag are narrow and show the continuation of the front and back designs, with some text and graphics wrapping around. The packaging appears to be made of a flexible, glossy plastic material, typical for snack bags, and is likely filled with air to protect the contents. The overall appearance is eye-catching and designed for retail display, with clear branding and flavor cues.
description: A glossy, black and red plastic bag of Cook's Smoky Bacon snacks with bacon imagery and detailed labeling. The packaging is designed for retail with prominent flavor and brand information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Cook's logo, smoky bacon imagery, and bold red and white flavor text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the bag and partial wraparound of the front and back graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displaying dense white text, including product description and nutritional facts panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible red and black color blocks and partial text from the front and back.
attribute_brand_logo: The Cook's brand logo is visible on the front, top center of the bag, in white text with a stylized 'Cook's' and a small rectangular white mark above it.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag displays the text 'SMOKY BACON' in white and red, with a photographic image of bacon strips, clearly indicating the bacon flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on the back of the bag, including a nutrition facts panel and ingredients list in white text.
